  • Method Details

    • accountGroupId

      public AccountsListAvailableEnrollments1Request.Builder accountGroupId(String accountGroupId)
      The accountGroup id.

    • pageSize

      public AccountsListAvailableEnrollments1Request.Builder pageSize(int pageSize)
      The maximum number of available enrollments to return. The service may return fewer than this value. The maximum value is 100; values above 100 will be coerced to 100.

    • pageSize

      public AccountsListAvailableEnrollments1Request.Builder pageSize(Optional<Integer> pageSize)
      The maximum number of available enrollments to return. The service may return fewer than this value. The maximum value is 100; values above 100 will be coerced to 100.

    • pageToken

      public AccountsListAvailableEnrollments1Request.Builder pageToken(String pageToken)
      A page token, received from a previous `ListAvailableEnrollments` call. Provide this to retrieve the subsequent page.

      When paginating, all other parameters provided to `ListAvailableEnrollments` must match the call that provided the page token.

    • pageToken

      public AccountsListAvailableEnrollments1Request.Builder pageToken(Optional<String> pageToken)
      A page token, received from a previous `ListAvailableEnrollments` call. Provide this to retrieve the subsequent page.

      When paginating, all other parameters provided to `ListAvailableEnrollments` must match the call that provided the page token.

    • filter

      public AccountsListAvailableEnrollments1Request.Builder filter(String filter)
      A CEL string to filter results; See the [CEL Search](https://developer.apexclearing.com/apex-fintech-solutions/docs/cel-search) page in Guides for more information; Filter options include: `enrollment_type`
